articles.title: Antonio Felix da Costa on Edoardo Mortara’s apology after Monaco E-Prix collision: “I just want people to apologise”
articles.description: Fans praised Antonio Felix da Costa for the way he reacted to Edoardo Mortara’s apology after the pair collided during Round 10 of the Monaco E-Prix. Mortara also earned admiration for quickly apologising to the Jaguar TCS Racing driver, who had already been involved in another incident with Dan Ticktum earlier in the weekend.

articles.title: ‘Your 3D cricketer’: India’s 2019 World Cup squad member announces retirement
articles.description: All-rounder Vijay Shankar has announced his retirement from all Indian domestic cricket and the IPL, concluding a career that saw him represent India in ODIs and T20Is, including the 2019 World Cup. Shankar, who played 12 ODIs and 9 T20Is, expressed gratitude for his journey and plans to explore new opportunities in cricket.

articles.description: The BSF, with SAI, held a three-day volleyball tournament in Rajouri for youth from Rajouri and Poonch districts. The 'SPANDAN' event aims to promote sportsmanship, encourage a drug-free society, and provide a platform for local talent.

articles.title: Forza Horizon 6 Hakone Nanamagari Touge: Location, how to unlock, and more
articles.description: Forza Horizon 6 players seeking the Hakone Nanamagari Touge race for the Gazoo Racer challenge can find it in the Nangan region, southwest of Tokyo. Unlocking this challenging hairpin race requires sufficient Discover Japan Stamp progression. Mastering braking and turning is key to victory in this demanding event, with the 2022 Toyota GR86 being the required vehicle.

articles.title: ‘You never know when the last one is going to be’: Kyle Busch’s haunting final words go viral
articles.description: Late NASCAR legend Kyle Busch made a heartbreaking remark after his Dover win days before his sudden death at 41. Here’s what he said.

articles.title: Ronaldo in tears after finally conquering Saudi Arabia; Al Nassr end title wait
articles.description: Cristiano Ronaldo finally clinched his maiden Saudi Pro League title with Al Nassr, scoring twice in a decisive 4-1 victory. The Portuguese superstar's emotional triumph came after two seasons of near misses, adding another domestic league crown to his illustrious career. His arrival has significantly boosted Saudi football's global profile.

articles.title: Eastern Conference Finals: Josh Hart pushes pace as Knicks test Cavaliers defense in Game 2
articles.description: Josh Hart remains central to the New York Knicks despite offensive struggles against the Cleveland Cavaliers in the Eastern Conference Finals. Cleveland’s defense, anchored by Jarrett Allen and Evan Mobley, has consistently sagged off Hart, creating spacing issues for New York. After the Knicks mounted a dramatic Game 1 comeback with Landry Shamet on the floor, Hart addressed his late-game benching with humility, stressing that team success matters more than personal minutes.

articles.title: Did you know? Highest-paid IPL players earn more than many CEOs. Here's a look at Top 25 cricketers
articles.description: Virat Kohli has emerged as the highest-earning player in IPL history, with cumulative earnings of ₹230.2 crore during his long association with Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

articles.description: LeBron James has fueled fresh NBA offseason speculation after admitting he has not decided whether to stay with the Los Angeles Lakers, continue playing elsewhere, or retire from basketball.

articles.title: Jalen Williams’ Injury Recovery Leaves Oklahoma City Thunder Facing Tough Playoff Questions
articles.description: Jalen Williams’ recurring hamstring injury has created concern for the Oklahoma City Thunder during the playoffs. The team is expected to take a cautious approach as recovery timelines remain uncertain following another setback.

articles.title: Caitlin Clark Announces Major New Personal Project Away From Basketball
articles.description: Caitlin Clark surprised fans after announcing a brand-new children’s picture book through a basketball-themed Instagram reveal. The Indiana Fever star shared photos from the project while confirming the book will officially release later this year.
